This is where it starts getting fun for me. Literally, this is the part, if you guys were kind of my office and hanging out, this is what we would do. We'd have a party doing this all day long. It's like my favorite, by far my favorite part of the business. You can ask anyone on my team, we got whiteboards everywhere and 90 percent of the time, I'm sitting there, what if we did this, and we can move this over here and it's so much fun. So that's what we're going to do. So I'm going to show you guys the nine core funnels that we use. Does not mean there's only nine funnels. There's a bajillion different ways you can do stuff. So there's a lot of different ways to do funnels. I'm just going to show you guys the core ones that we do, because that'll give you some foundation of how to start building your own off of this and you'll see how we do all these things. So I'm going to go through. So the first funnel is just our core overall funnel. This is what I showed you guys earlier today, but it's basically it's very simple. This is what it looks like. So I say when I come in here, I'm going to have all the traffic we control, all the paid apps we're going to go to, this squeeze page right here. If from there we're going to sell them something, then we're going to try to send them up, and we're going to try to get them on a continuity. People come from our blog, we'll come through here and then we'll try to sell them, upsell them. So this is like the high level one. So it's not very specific, but it shows you a really good overview of what it is. This is why yesterday when we sat down and wanted you guys to look at your value ladder, because I want you to be very good at where this top end is going to be, what this front end is going to be, what this is going to be, because now we're going to break it down into, this is what's the macro micro, this is the macro and we're going to go into the micro now. That's so much above my education level to even know that. I wasn't even sure if I was right. So hopefully that's what it actually means. So basically what we're going to be breaking down over these funnels really is just this piece right here, what it could look like, what it should look like. I promise you as you start seeing these things, a lot of them will probably look familiar to you.
